title: Rainbow Ancient Debris
description: Rainbow Ancient Debris gives Ancient Debris a vibrant rainbow gradient while keeping the original style and detail.
body:
Rainbow Ancient Debris replaces the standard dark brown texture with a smooth, multi-color gradient that keeps the original shading and structure intact. The design blends naturally with vanilla textures while making Ancient Debris far more visible and unique in the Nether.

It does not modify mechanics, rarity, or balance. It's purely visual. Perfect for players who want a clean but eye-catching upgrade to one of Minecraft's rarest blocks. 🌈

![TheDebris01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f4ac900ea8b850eec9c19921cc8dd92ee506884.png)
